m5stack_rs485_init.tooltip: Initialize onboard RS485 according to the official pins of the development board, no need to select RX, TX or direction pins

m5stack_rs485_available.tooltip: Returns the number of bytes in the receive buffer

m5stack_rs485_read_byte.tooltip: Read a byte; returns -1 if no data

m5stack_rs485_read_line.tooltip: Read until newline or 20ms timeout, and strip trailing whitespace

m5stack_rs485_write_text.message0: Onboard RS485 Send text %1 Line feed %2
m5stack_rs485_write_text.tooltip: Send text and automatically switch the sending and receiving direction, and return whether the text is completely written

m5stack_rs485_write_byte.tooltip: Send a byte and automatically switch the sending and receiving direction
